_comment: archinstall config for Example Music infrastructure nodes. Place alongside archinstall on PXE server. Run with: archinstall --config config.json --creds creds.json
post_install:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ANSIBLE_USER=ansible
SSH_KEY_URL=http://192.168.139.50/ansible_sshkey.pub
HOME_DIR=/home/${ANSIBLE_USER}

echo '>>> Adding ansible user to wheel group (sudo equivalent on Arch)...'
usermod -aG wheel ${ANSIBLE_USER}

echo '>>> Enabling wheel group NOPASSWD sudo...'
cat > /etc/sudoers.d/ansible <<'SUDOEOF'
# Ansible automation - full passwordless sudo
ansible ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL
SUDOEOF
chmod 0440 /etc/sudoers.d/ansible
visudo -c -f /etc/sudoers.d/ansible || {
  echo 'ERROR: sudoers syntax check failed -- removing bad file'
  rm -f /etc/sudoers.d/ansible
  exit 1
}

echo '>>> Creating .ssh directory...'
mkdir -p ${HOME_DIR}/.ssh

echo '>>> Fetching Ansible SSH public key...'
curl -fsSL -o ${HOME_DIR}/.ssh/authorized_keys ${SSH_KEY_URL} || {
  echo 'WARNING: Could not fetch SSH key from ${SSH_KEY_URL}'
  echo 'Place the Ansible public key manually at ${HOME_DIR}/.ssh/authorized_keys'
}

echo '>>> Setting permissions...'
chown -R ${ANSIBLE_USER}:${ANSIBLE_USER} ${HOME_DIR}
chmod 700 ${HOME_DIR}/.ssh
[ -f ${HOME_DIR}/.ssh/authorized_keys ] && chmod 600 ${HOME_DIR}/.ssh/authorized_keys

echo '>>> Writing .vimrc...'
printf 'set ruler\nset bg=dark\nsyntax on\n' > ${HOME_DIR}/.vimrc
chown ${ANSIBLE_USER}:${ANSIBLE_USER} ${HOME_DIR}/.vimrc

echo '>>> Hardening sshd...'
# Disable root login and password auth -- key-only, non-root only
sed -i 's/^#*PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
sed -i 's/^#*PasswordAuthentication.*/PasswordAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
sed -i 's/^#*PubkeyAuthentication.*/PubkeyAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
# Ensure the directives exist even if sed found nothing to replace
grep -q '^PermitRootLogin' /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo 'PermitRootLogin no' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config
grep -q '^PasswordAuthentication' /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo 'PasswordAuthentication no' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config
grep -q '^PubkeyAuthentication' /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo 'PubkeyAuthentication yes' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config

echo '>>> Verifying...'
echo '--- passwd entry:'
grep ^${ANSIBLE_USER}: /etc/passwd
echo '--- authorized_keys:'
cat ${HOME_DIR}/.ssh/authorized_keys 2>/dev/null || echo '(not present -- fetch manually)'
echo '--- permissions:'
ls -la ${HOME_DIR}/
ls -la ${HOME_DIR}/.ssh/ 2>/dev/null || true
echo '--- sshd root login:'
grep PermitRootLogin /etc/ssh/sshd_config

echo '>>> post_install complete.'
